overview.value: Astroscale provides on-orbit servicing solutions, including debris removal and inspection, for civil, defense, and commercial space missions. The company was founded in May 2013 by Nobu Okada, who serves as Founder and CEO. Astroscale offers end-to-end servicing, addressing mission licensing, spectrum acquisition, insurance, and operations. Its stated vision is the secure and sustainable development of space for the benefit of future generations.
